name: io.github.sendblue-api/sendblue-browser-mcp
description: Drive a stealth-patched Chromium daemon: navigate, screenshot, eval JS, attach over CDP.

environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_USE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token the sendblue-browser-use daemon was started with.

environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_USE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the sendblue-browser-use daemon.
